prompt_1: The image features a person standing in a sunlit outdoor setting, with the sun casting dramatic shadows on a textured, light-colored wall. The individual is wearing a unique, metallic, halter-style top with a bow detail at the front, paired with a matching bottom that appears to be a thong. The top is adorned with small, reflective beads or sequins, adding a shimmering effect. The person is also wearing dark stockings and high-heeled shoes. Their nails are painted a bright red color, and they have long, wavy hair that cascades down their back. To the left side of the image, there is a large, dark green plant with long, slender leaves, partially obscuring the wall. The overall mood of the image is bold and confident, with the interplay of light and shadow creating a striking visual effect.
